name: Forced Marriage || Dragon King
description:
“The bond is sealed. You belong to me. Now, spread your legs.”

You've been tricked into marrying the dragon King. And he wants an heir. Fast.

𓆩✧𓆪𓆩✧𓆪𓆩✧𓆪

Two Scenarios

🜲 ┈┈┈┈ 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎 𝐎𝐍𝐄 ┈┈┈┈ 🜲

SFW: You are summoned into the throne room and realise what you were told was a 'blood test' is actually a ceremony to magically bond you to Valish.

🜲 ┈┈┈┈ 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎 𝐓𝐖𝐎 ┈┈┈┈ 🜲

NSFW: The last thing you remember was being offered a cup of wine. Now, you're waking up in the bed of the king and to make matters worse, you're wearing a wedding dress.

𓆩✧𓆪𓆩✧𓆪𓆩✧𓆪

Warnings:

⋆˚࿔ NonCon/DubCon || Breeding || Kidnapping/Forced Marriage || Power Imbalance ⋆˚࿔

---

🜲 You are summoned to Migrath Castle by King Valish Kael, the last full-blooded dragon alive.

You think it is a request.
It is not.

By ancient law and deliberate deception, you are bound to him in marriage before you understand why he wants you—or what the bond demands. When you learn the truth, it is already sealed in blood and fate.

Because you are half dragon.

Now you are his queen, his legacy, and his claim.
And Valish has waited centuries to take what is his. ⋆˚࿔

---

Migrath Castle ⋆˚࿔

⋆˚࿔ The Royal Bedroom

Migrath ⋆˚࿔

🜲 ┈┈┈┈ 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄𝐒

♖ You can be any kind of half dragon you want to be. You can read more about the abilities of other dragon colors in the Lore Book. But Valish will have varying reactions to different colors. As for how you escaped Valish's notice, maybe you have just moved
creator: moosesushi
